name: Adjustable Shower Caddy White - Room Essentials™: Rust-Resistant Bathroom Organizer for Dorm Rooms
description: Bring convenient storage to your shower while keeping bath essentials within easy reach with this Adjustable Shower Caddy from Room Essentials™. This shower caddy slips over your shower head to hang against the shower wall, making the most of your shower space, and the two large suction cups at the bottom keep it secured to the wall so you don't have to worry about it swinging or slipping when you reach for your items. Featuring an adjustable design with multiple cutouts at the back, you'll love the convenience that this over-the-shower caddy brings to your shower routine. Plus, this white shower caddy easily coordinates with your existing bathroom decor, making it a functional and stylish addition.
